label: Anchor portals to triangle formation — fix bottom-left drift
notes: At low chaos (0.08), driftMult=0.136 barely moves portals from their phase-determined Lissajous position — they were phase-locked in the bottom-left. Fix: added explicit base positions forming a portrait triangle (p0 top-center, p1 bottom-right, p2 bottom-left) at (0.0,0.28), (0.22,-0.22), (-0.22,-0.22). Lissajous drift is now a tight offset on top of these bases (amplitude reduced from ±0.44/0.58 to ±0.18/0.22). At chaos=0, portals sit at their triangle bases. At chaos=1, driftMult=1.0 and portals drift wider and faster as before.

operations.note: Added base0/base1/base2 triangle positions. Lissajous amplitude cut from 0.44/0.58 to 0.18/0.22.
operations.before: Freeform Lissajous with amplitudes up to ±0.58 — phase-locked in bottom-left at chaos=0.08
